title: helicteres lanceolata var. gagnepainiana
intro: Helicteres lanceolata var. gagnepainiana, also known as a variety of the helicteres lanceolata plant, is a type of plant species in the family Malpighiaceae. It is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory infections. In traditional herbal medicine, helicteres lanceolata var. gagnepainiana is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of a tincture or ointment.
